text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So I hear you have a suggestion for one of our
posters?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yup! And I just know the groovy cats at this
school are gonna love it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why not put the Arc de Triomphe in the
background? I bet it'd look super rad!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite the idea... I'll have to let the public
relations office know.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
On a more personal note... Maruzensky, may I ask
you a question?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is "groovy" one of those terms that is fashionable
nowadays?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am a bit behind the times when it comes to
slang. Could I trouble you to teach me a few
words?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, no problemo! ☆ When it comes to slang,
I'm your gal!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I can't wait to see the look on Air
Groove and the others' faces. Haha.
